# Job লাগবে (Job Lagbe)

> Bangladesh's trusted job portal — find government and private sector jobs, career resources, courses, and e-books in Bengali.

Job Lagbe lists thousands of verified job circulars from across Bangladesh. Job seekers can search and apply, employers can post jobs, and the platform offers career-building courses, e-books, and a company directory.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Search jobs, browse categories, latest circulars.
- [Jobs](/jobs): Full job listings with filters (category, location, type).
- [Companies](/companies): Directory of hiring employers in Bangladesh.
- [Blog](/blog): Career advice, interview tips, and job market insights.
- [Courses](/courses): Skill-building courses for job seekers.
- [E-books](/ebooks): Downloadable career and exam preparation e-books.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Job Lagbe support team.
- [Install App](/install): Install the Job Lagbe PWA on mobile/desktop.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
